# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "mvpapistorage",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Prefix for the storage account name. A unique string will be appended."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountName": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountNamePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": true,
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountPrimaryEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(variables('storageAccountName')).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    }
  }
}
